task: Generate a bash script at /tmp/clive/scraper.sh that fetches a webpage URL (first arg), extracts all links, and saves them to a file (second arg). Handle errors gracefully. Test with https://news.ycombinator.com/. Write link count to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

Generate a database backup script at /tmp/clive/db_backup.sh for SQLite. It should: dump the database to SQL, compress with gzip, add timestamp to filename, keep last 5 backups (rotate older ones). Test with a small SQLite DB. Write backup info to /tmp/clive/result.txt.

initial_state.setup: sqlite3 /tmp/clive/test.db 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (id INTEGER, name TEXT); INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, "test");'

task: Generate a monitoring script at /tmp/clive/api_monitor.sh that checks a list of API endpoints for response time and status code. Write results as JSON to /tmp/clive/result.json. Test with: https://httpbin.org/get, https://api.github.com, https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts/1.

Generate a Python report builder at /tmp/clive/build_report.py that reads a CSV, generates HTML with a data table, summary statistics, and a simple ASCII chart embedded as a <pre> block. Test with sample data. Write HTML to /tmp/clive/result.html.

Generate a Python script at /tmp/clive/parse_emails.py that reads raw email files from /tmp/clive/emails/, extracts: sender, subject, date, and body preview (first 100 chars). Write a JSON summary to /tmp/clive/result.json.

initial_state.setup:
mkdir -p /tmp/clive/emails && echo 'From: kiu@ikangai.com
To: martin@ikangai.com
Subject: Q2 Planning
Date: Wed, 09 Apr 2026 14:00:00 +0200

Hi Martin, let us schedule the Q2 planning session for next Wednesday.' > /tmp/clive/emails/msg1.eml && echo 'From: sarah@techstart.de
To: martin@ikangai.com
Subject: Invoice INV-042
Date: Tue, 08 Apr 2026 10:30:00 +0200

Please find attached the invoice for March consulting work.' > /tmp/clive/emails/msg2.eml

success_criteria.check: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/tmp/clive/result.json')); assert len(d)==2; assert any('kiu' in str(e) for e in d)"

task: Generate a script at /tmp/clive/gen_changelog.sh that reads git log from the current repo, groups commits by type (feat/fix/refactor/docs/chore), and generates a markdown CHANGELOG. Test it and write output to /tmp/clive/result.md.

Generate a Python invoice generator at /tmp/clive/gen_invoice.py that reads line items from a JSON file, calculates subtotal/VAT/total, and outputs a formatted text invoice. Test with 3 items. Write invoice to /tmp/clive/result.txt.
